title: [FIRRTL][RemoveInvalids] Doesn't look through ands and ors

features.name: async reset register with OR-based reset condition
features.description: Code should include an async reset register where the reset condition combines reset and current register value using OR logic

features.name: register with combinational OR logic in assignment
features.description: Code should include a register assignment where the new value is computed as an OR between reset signal and the register's current value
features.snippet:
reg r;
always @(posedge clock) r <= reset | r;
